comments.text: Example excerpt 1: players often mention weekly lockout and that the drop is extremely rare.
Example excerpt 2: someone suggests running with a group that agrees on mount loot rules before the boss.
Example excerpt 3: reminder that legacy loot mode affects how many items drop.
